{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211402030CDDB373493249280DDA"}"},"total":100},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604523487316067097","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这部作品堪称将刑侦悬疑与东方玄学巧妙熔铸的创新之作！穿越回1996年的设定瞬间拉满时代氛围与怀旧质感，而主角陈野以狱警身份为起点，手握“罪恶提示系统”与风水镇煞之术，展开了一场别开生面的破局之旅。“双系统”设定精妙绝伦——既能以现代刑侦思维洞悉罪案线索，又能以传统智慧化解无形阴煞，一实一虚、一科学一玄学，在九十年代的背景板下碰撞出惊人的火花。作者不仅构思了高智商的探案情节，更深植了充满神秘色彩的文化底蕴，让主角在铁血监狱与离奇凶案间，左手理性推理缉拿真凶，右手玄术镇煞抚平人心。这种打破常规的跨界设定，不仅让故事悬念迭起、爽感十足，更赋予了刑侦题材独特的文化纵深与哲学韵味，堪称一部让人耳目一生的匠心之作！","text_exts":[{"e":182,"s":179,"text":"高智商","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%AB%98%E6%99%BA%E5%95%86&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407292349280DDA%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227604523487316067097%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227596730443899096089%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%AB%98%E6%99%BA%E5%95%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770568017,"group_id":"7596730443899096089","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N365a2MClU0kP1g+dT9TVB0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1fd0ed23e58e40099639493a980d577b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616228&x-signature=JWbIfN%2Bl4op%2F38M4NapyDJX7vdg%3D","user_id":"70842581537","user_name":"在下王十三"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"70842581537","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770965733,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7596730443899096089","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越90年代成为狱警，手握“罪恶提示”系统，左手神探破案，右手风水镇煞，从监狱起步震惊刑侦界！
刑侦大队队长陈野穿越回1996年，身份竟是一名刚入职的狱警。他觉醒了“罪恶提示系统”（提示类系统），不仅能看到罪犯头顶的罪恶值，还能在案发现场看到关键线索的“高亮提示”，甚至能通过风水望气术洞察凶宅阴煞......
